name: valirscans-downloader
description: Self-hosted web app for browsing ValirScans and downloading chapters as CBZ files for use in Suwatte.

scripts.test: node test-scraping.js && node test-cbz.js && node test-server.js && node test-watchlist.js && node test-filters.js && node test-epub.js && node test-novel-fallback.js && node test-pagination-bug.js
